data.content: Shipment review failed on 2026-03-12: approved implementation commit 3b1290788d0b is tagged on the knot but is not an ancestor of origin/main. Current main still contains the earlier 63c9ce7d5059 help colorization only, so the shipped code is missing the later semantic command colors, FORCE_COLOR handling, and help-cli test coverage even though CI is green for main.
